Package org.eventb.internal.ui

Class RodinElementStructuredLabelProvider

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.commands.common.EventManager
org.eclipse.jface.viewers.BaseLabelProvider
org.eclipse.jface.viewers.LabelProvider
org.eventb.internal.ui.RodinElementStructuredLabelProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.eclipse.core.resources.IResourceChangeListener, org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IBaseLabelProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IFontProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ILabelProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
RodinElementTableLabelProvider, RodinElementTreeLabelProvider
public abstract class RodinElementStructuredLabelProvider extends org.eclipse.jface.viewers.LabelProvider implements org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IFontProvider, org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener, org.eclipse.core.resources.IResourceChangeListener
